overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a dimly lit apartment corridor featuring distinctive jellyfish graffiti murals, transitioning into a compact residential bathroom with white tiled walls and fixtures. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with atmospheric lighting and detailed cyberpunk-inspired environmental design.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow, dimly lit corridor with distinctive blue walls covered in jellyfish-themed graffiti art. A fluorescent light fixture illuminates the left wall as the camera approaches a doorway at the end of the hall.

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions through the doorway from the corridor into a compact bathroom with white tiled walls. A washing machine becomes visible on the left, a bathtub in the center, and a storage cabinet on the right as the space opens up.

small rectangular vent or window high on the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera explores the bathroom interior, revealing a white bathtub, toilet, and various fixtures. The view pans across the white tiled walls, showing a towel rack, laundry basket, and storage shelves as the camera moves deeper into the room and focuses on the bathtub area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a moody, art-filled corridor into the sterile brightness of a compact residential bathroom. It begins by gliding through a narrow hallway with blue walls adorned in jellyfish graffiti, guided by the glow of a fluorescent light fixture toward a doorway. As the camera passes through the threshold, the dim atmosphere shifts abruptly to a bright interior featuring white tiled walls and a washing machine. The scene then expands to reveal the layout of the small room, panning across a toilet and storage shelves before moving deeper into the space. Finally, the camera focuses on the bathtub area, lingering on the towel rack and laundry basket against the clean white backdrop.
